description_long: This is a rectangular, box-shaped cabinet or shelf with a hollow interior and open ends, constructed from a dark, solid material. The object features a simple, minimalist design with clean, straight edges and a uniform surface texture. Both the front and back faces are open, allowing for easy access to the interior, which is spacious and unobstructed. The sides and top are solid, providing structural support and a flat surface for placing items. The exterior finish is matte and dark, likely black or deep charcoal, giving it a modern, industrial appearance. This object could serve as a storage cubby, open shelf, or utility compartment in urban environments such as garages, sidewalks, or public spaces.
description: A dark, rectangular open-ended cabinet or shelf with a minimalist, boxy design and matte finish. Both ends are open, revealing a spacious interior for storage or display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open rectangular face and hollow interior.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, elongated rectangular side panel with no openings.
description_view_2: Back view mirroring the front, with an open face and visible hollow interior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the solid side panel.
